Cosmic Evolution & Densities

Time history of energy densities ρ_S (structural soliton core) and ρ_I (interface boundary pool).

CMB Perturbation Power Spectra

Primordial Scalar P_s(k) and Tensor P_t(k) power spectra derived under boundary leakage.

CMB Low-Multipole Quadrupole Deficit

Comparison of low-l multipole power showing standard overprediction vs TAP damping vs Planck observations.

Bekenstein Entropy Accumulation

Cosmic entropy growth triggering Fibonacci bundle dimension transitions (3D → 5D → 8D → 13D).

Electroweak RGE Coupling Running

Running of gauge couplings g1 (hypercharge) and g2 (weak) from weak scale to Planck energy.

Gauge Boson Masses (mW, mZ)

Electroweak symmetry breaking masses running with energy scale.

Quark Mass Overlaps

Pred (TAP Fibonacci boundary overlap) vs Observed (PDG) quark mass eigenstates (MeV).

Neutrino Mass Eigenstates

Lightest, medium, and heaviest neutrino mass scales predicted in milli-eV.

Muon g-2 Feynman Loop Integrand

1-loop magnetic moment vertex parameter integrand: standard QED vs extra-dimensional warped propagator.

Muonic Hydrogen Probability Density

Radial wavefunction probability density u(r)^2 comparing electronic vs muonic hydrogen finite proton sizes.

Prebiotic Autocatalytic Homochirality

Bifurcation of L-enantiomer vs D-enantiomer concentrations driven by a 10^-4 TAP metric twist bias.

Brusselator Dissipative Chemical Clock

Limit-cycle oscillations in concentrations of Chemical X and Y coupled to cosmic leakage drag.

Molecular Hybridization Geometry

Minimizing orbital overlaps under the 3:1 partition yields the exact tetrahedral angle of 109.47°.
